title: Migrate Salesforce Files Between Orgs
overview: A Pipeline runs two #Batch Executables to migrate Salesforce Files and their links to a remote org. The first migrates ContentDocument to ContentVersion and stores the source identifier in a custom field. The second migrates ContentDocumentLink and re-establishes the links. Additional batches extend the same pattern to other linked objects.
generalUseCase: Use a Pipeline with sequential #Batch Executables to migrate Salesforce Files and rebuild their links in a target org, using VLOOKUP and External IDs to maintain data relationships when re-establishing ContentDocumentLink associations.
